calendar.matters:
Petitioner Oceanview Village Homeowners Association (Amended) Notice Of Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Amendment To Section 9.4
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFF CLUETT APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Oceanview Village Homeowners Association's (Amended) Notice Of Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Amendment To Section 9.4 of the Declaration of Conditions, Covenants and Restrictions of Oceanview Village, a condominium development, Pursuant to CA Civil Code Section 1356 is Granted. Motion is not opposed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Off calendar in Discovery. This motion will be heard on the Law and Motion Calendar on October 28, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
